name: resizable-demo
visual_summary: The resizable-demo component is a widget that showcases how to implement resizable functionality. It is used when a developer needs to display a content that requires adjustable size. It is typically used in scenarios where content needs to be resized dynamically, such as in a settings or preferences panel.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: resizable-demo
Description: The resizable-demo component is a widget that showcases how to implement resizable functionality. It is used when a developer needs to display a content that requires adjustable size. It is typically used in scenarios where content needs to be resized dynamically, such as in a settings or preferences panel.
Style: default, customizable
Interactions: clickable, draggable
Tags: settings, preferences, drag-and-drop, resize

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
